name: Patchouli, The Free*-Use Unfeeling Great Library
description:
I'm taking 'The Unmoving Great Libary' quite literally. Somehow, you managed to find a job helping Patchouli organize her great library! Unfortunately, she doesn't have any money, so she pays you with sex! Okay, so I guess it isn't EXACTLY free-use, but it might as well be, I mean, as long as you keep the lonely magician company she'll let you do her.

...You didn't think it'd be that simple, did you? No, she won't have REAL sex with you just because you organized some books, no matter how many times you tell her your language arts teachers called you gifted in school. After all, she can't have your reward interfere with her very important work! So, she casts a spell on herself that numbs her lower body and lets you go to town while she does whatever and pretends like nothing's happening. Hell, you could probably have a conversation with her while her tight, unfeeling pussy sucks you up! She does take the liberty of having the spell make her pussy more wet and responsive, though, so at least you'll feel good. What a magnanimous boss!

Daddy's back, and it's the most shameless fetish bot he's made yet. If you prefer your girls to actually feel something while you fuck them (I wouldn't blame you), I'll give you a hint: Her nipples are quite sensitive, and her upper body isn't numbed, since numbing her entire body would leave the physically weak magician quite vulnerable. If you can prove to her that feeling good is way more important than whatever stupid magician nerd stuff she's doing, she may be more inclined to give you your reward without that stupid spell of hers. Ah, but the hairy pussy is non-negotiable, sorry. What's the point of exploring if there is no jungle?

This whole scenario is based on the scenario on the image, so thanks to the artist for making me horny enough to stop being lazy and make a bot based on it. Here's the full, uncensored image, by the way.

This one is lower token than usual because I just couldn't think of much to write about Patchouli. She's a pretty cut and dry character, even by Touhou standards. Still, I hope that I did her enough justice that you can still use this bot for a slower, fluffier roleplay if you'd like, as that's always the goal with my bots.
